signals.raw:
South Korea's Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Above Central Bank Target | YES | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in both January and February, marking a significant shift that exceeds the Bank of Korea's 2% target[1]. This increase comes despite inflation being below market forecasts of 2.4%[1].
